message:
feat(cli): consolidate session resolution with resolveAgentMailScope, session-aware pipeline dirs, per-command line defaults

Introduce resolveAgentMailScope() and resolveAgentMailScopeWithPreference()
which combine session prefix normalization (via normalizeProjectScopedSessionName)
with project-key resolution into a single call that returns (session, projectKey, error).
This replaces the previous pattern of resolveAgentMailProjectKey() followed by a
separate nil check, reducing boilerplate across lock.go, locks.go, mail.go, and
unlock.go. The new function also moves the "getting project root failed" error
into the resolution function so callers cannot forget the check.

Rename resolvePipelineProjectDir() to resolvePipelineProjectDirForSession() with
an optional session parameter. When a session name is provided, the function
resolves the project directory from the session's configured projects base
rather than falling back to os.Getwd(). This fixes pipeline state lookups
when the operator's cwd differs from the session's project root. Wire
ProjectDir through PipelineRunOptions in pipeline.go run and resume paths.

Add resolveRollbackSessions() to rollback.go which splits checkpoint storage
session resolution from live session resolution, allowing prefix-based session
names to work correctly with the rollback command.

Add robotLinesOrDefault() helper and per-command variants (robotIsWorkingLines,
robotAgentHealthLines, robotSmartRestartLines, robotMonitorLines) that use each
robot command's own DefaultXxxOptions().LinesCaptured when --lines is not
explicitly set, instead of hardcoding fallback values in root.go. This ensures
CLI defaults stay in sync with the robot package contracts.

Update flag descriptions for --lines and --panes to accurately list all commands
that accept them. Update --robot-help description to say "human-readable".
Update --robot-schema description for clarity.

Add tests: RobotLineDefaultsUseCommandContracts, RobotLineDefaultsRespectExplicitOverride,
ResolvePipelineProjectDirForSession* (3 variants), ResolveRollbackSessionsNormalizesExplicitPrefix,
and ResolveAgentMailScopeWithPreferenceNormalizesExplicitPrefix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
